description: Unfolds a ThreeJS solid shape into its flat 2D net pattern.
utility: Unfold a 3D solid into a flat net

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Canvas position for the net view

arguments.name: solidRef
arguments.description: Reference to solid shape to unfold

examples.expression:
S = cube3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
net = unfold3d(at(4,22), S, view(14,14), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))

S = pyramid3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 4, c(brown))
net = unfold3d(at(4,22), S, view(20,20))
